C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WinGet\Packages\BrechtSanders.WinLibs.POSIX.UCRT_Microsoft.Winget.Source_8wekyb3d8bbwe\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\demo_echo.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o demo_echo.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libdemo_echo.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\demo_echo.dir\linkLibs.rsp
